- **Average Word Count:** ~350 words per post

## 📝 MDX File Structure

Each generated file includes:

```yaml
---
id: {question-id}
title: {question-title}
slug: {url-friendly-slug}
channel: {category}
difficulty: {level}
tags: [{tags}]
createdAt: {timestamp}
readingTime: 10
excerpt: {summary}
---

> **{Hook}**

## Overview
{Content from question answer}

## Technical Details
{Implementation details}

## Real-World Examples
{Production examples}

## Best Practices
{Recommendations}

## Conclusion
{Summary}

## References
{Sources}
```

## 🚀 How to Generate More

```bash
# Generate 50 more posts
node script/generate-blog-fast.js 50

# Generate 100 posts
node script/generate-blog-fast.js 100

# Generate all remaining questions
node script/generate-blog-fast.js 1000
```

## 💡 Key Features

✅ **Fast Generation** - Instant processing, no AI delays  
✅ **Structured Content** - Consistent MDX format  
✅ **SEO Ready** - Full frontmatter with metadata  
✅ **Production Quality** - Clean, readable markdown  
✅ **Scalable** - Can process thousands of questions  

## 📂 File Locations

- **Generated Posts:** `content/posts/*.mdx`
- **Generator Script:** `script/generate-blog-fast.js`
- **Template:** `templates/blog-template-elite.md`
- **Documentation:** `docs/BLOG_GENERATION_SYSTEM.md`
